headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Valuation Check After Prolonged Share Price Slide
summary: Comcast stock moves after extended share price slide Comcast (CMCSA) has drawn fresh attention after an extended slide in its share price, with the stock down about 8% over the past month and roughly 19% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Comcast. That short term slide comes on top of weaker momentum over a longer horizon, with the share price down 15.81% year to date and the 1 year total shareholder return declining 19.84%. This points to fading enthusiasm and a more...
